name: 东方剑姬在西方旅行的故事
slug: 东方剑姬在西方旅行的故事
short_description: A day early in the morning from the matchless received a letter from the kernel, hope miss Matchless to the West to help, by the way the wto test. Matchless then set foot on the journey to the West.
detailed_description:
The game is introduced


From the clock unparalleled, from the eldest daughter of the clock home, practice kendo for many years. But lack of actual combat experience, one day received a letter from the clansman, hoping to go to the West to help. After asking his father, the next day matchless set foot on the journey to the West.
A few days later, however, morganshire, the destination, was transformed. Within a few days, a tower had suddenly grown to the height of the sky. Some sources said that this tower was the place where the seven SINS were imprisoned. And matchless second uncle - Zhong From the kernel to seal up so far has not returned.
Unparalleled impatient, go to the tower to rescue the second uncle.

The game elements

Deeply probing

Single end
